isi.lyrics:
Lyric ENHYPEN - The Fugitives (English ver.)

Romanization

The protective world that once surrounded them
slowly twists into a snare meant to capture them.

Everyone predicted the two would soon be caught,
that they would quickly discover their limits and fall into despair.
They would come to regret their reckless choice,
begin to doubt one another’s love,
and ultimately, succumb to their fate.
This cruel certainty, spoken in one voice, poisoned the sacred well of their love.

But then, a sighting was reported
that stunned them all.

The fleeing couple, it was said, were laughing,
as if they were reveling in the chase.

Their expressions were carefree,
at times even alight with a thrilling ecstasy.

Having shattered the rules,
and calling to each other across the wreckage of their past,
they seemed to overflow with confidence,
they could build a heaven with their own two hands.

As if this chase were some exhilarating game,
they already seemed
utterly captivated by the danger.


Hangeul

The protective world that once surrounded them
slowly twists into a snare meant to capture them.

Everyone predicted the two would soon be caught,
that they would quickly discover their limits and fall into despair.
They would come to regret their reckless choice,
begin to doubt one another’s love,
and ultimately, succumb to their fate.
This cruel certainty, spoken in one voice, poisoned the sacred well of their love.

But then, a sighting was reported
that stunned them all.

The fleeing couple, it was said, were laughing,
as if they were reveling in the chase.

Their expressions were carefree,
at times even alight with a thrilling ecstasy.

Having shattered the rules,
and calling to each other across the wreckage of their past,
they seemed to overflow with confidence,
they could build a heaven with their own two hands.

As if this chase were some exhilarating game,
they already seemed
utterly captivated by the danger.

Lyric ENHYPEN - No Way Back (Feat. So!YoON!)

Romanization

neoraneun ummyeongeul nan taekhae

No way, no way, no way back now

imi neoro jeonghaejyeo inneun answer

naege jeonghaejin dan hanaui gil

idaero meolli tteona

nunapui sesangeul deungjin chae
gwageoui geurimjareul jiwo

No way, no way, no way back now
No way, no way, no way back now

이미 너로 정해져 있는 answer

외면해도 전부 all for nothing

isi.lyrics:
Lyric ENHYPEN - The Beginning (English ver.)

Romanization

Fate, at times, leads us down a treacherous path
from which there is no turning back.

The story
begins one night, with the sudden disappearance
of a couple.

Like a masterpiece stolen from an art museum
without so much as a whisper from the alarms,
the two vanished,
leaving no trace behind.

Overwhelmed by their love for each other,
consumed by the desire to become completely identical,
they dared to dream a forbidden dream, one that defied the absolute laws of vampire society
and crossed a line they knew must never be crossed.

A sin no one else had dared to even imagine.
To create a vampire without sanction.

The society is thrown into chaos.
Soon, the Vampire Pursuit Unit (VPU) is dispatched to hunt down the lovers.
This hyena-like pack of vampires,
relentless in their chase,
slowly closes in on their target.

In a world of peace and comfort.
How long can these two, who had never before strayed from one another's side,
endure this desperate flight?

And yet,
even as the cold gazes they have never before known
pierce them like blades,
and sudden waves of anxiety
shake their bodies like a bitter wind,
they press on, continuing their journey towards the world's edge
without so much as a safety net.

As if each were the other’s only salvation.
As if, with their love, there was nothing left to fear.


Hangeul

Fate, at times, leads us down a treacherous path
from which there is no turning back.

The story
begins one night, with the sudden disappearance
of a couple.

Like a masterpiece stolen from an art museum
without so much as a whisper from the alarms,

leaving no trace behind.

Overwhelmed by their love for each other,
consumed by the desire to become completely identical,
they dared to dream a forbidden dream, one that defied the absolute laws of vampire society
and crossed a line they knew must never be crossed.

A sin no one else had dared to even imagine.
To create a vampire without sanction.

The society is thrown into chaos.
Soon, the Vampire Pursuit Unit (VPU) is dispatched to hunt down the lovers.
This hyena-like pack of vampires,
relentless in their chase,
slowly closes in on their target.

In a world of peace and comfort.
How long can these two, who had never before strayed from one another's side,
endure this desperate flight?

And yet,
even as the cold gazes they have never before known
pierce them like blades,
and sudden waves of anxiety
shake their bodies like a bitter wind,
they press on, continuing their journey towards the world's edge
without so much as a safety net.

As if each were the other’s only salvation.
As if, with their love, there was nothing left to fear.
isi.lyrics_timestamp:
Fate, at times, leads us down a treacherous path 
from which there is no turning back.

The story
begins one night, with the sudden disappearance
of a couple.

Like a masterpiece stolen from an art museum
without so much as a whisper from the alarms,
the two vanished,
leaving no trace behind.

Overwhelmed by their love for each other,
consumed by the desire to become completely identical,
they dared to dream a forbidden dream, one that defied the absolute laws of vampire society
and crossed a line they knew must never be crossed.

A sin no one else had dared to even imagine.
To create a vampire without sanction.

The society is thrown into chaos.
Soon, the Vampire Pursuit Unit (VPU) is dispatched to hunt down the lovers.
This hyena-like pack of vampires,
relentless in their chase,
slowly closes in on their target.

In a world of peace and comfort.
How long can these two, who had never before strayed from one another's side,
endure this desperate flight?

And yet,
even as the cold gazes they have never before known
pierce them like blades,
and sudden waves of anxiety
shake their bodies like a bitter wind,
they press on, continuing their journey towards the world's edge
without so much as a safety net.

As if each were the other’s only salvation.
As if, with their love, there was nothing left to fear.
